response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile aimed at first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners in Orlando and surrounding areas. We specialize in helping buyers and sellers navigate the real estate market, offering comprehensive support in all aspects of property transactions and financing. As a trusted advisor, we aim to build long-term relationships with our clients, ensuring a reliable and transparent experience throughout the home buying or selling process. Our team is based in Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region, covering central Florida. We operate with a small, dedicated team of real estate professionals committed to delivering quality service and personalized support.
